title: Why looks and appearance matter
author: Priya
content:
Every person is born with unique features that may or may not be perfect, but we try to enhance our beauty by making our external presence more showy and captivating. Our body and traits, which we acquired during birth, need due care with time. Our body is a composition of sensitive organs, and replenishing it with food and nutrients needs all vitals required for the body making from within, but we also need some extra routine care and nourishment to guard our body and skin from the outer environment. Our inner beauty is a 4-day wonder and can't stay for long, and what we carry all our life is pounds of mackup and external pleasantries. 

Wilted beauty with age

~ Beauty isn't perennial and can't remain intact for ages. We r a flesh and bone structure with some personality traits of brownie eyes, a chiseled face, or a pointed nose. And we love ourselves as we r. We glorify our short-lasting beauty with slaps of makeup and beauty accessories, but do nothing much to beautify our inner selves. We can doll up our external beauty but care less for things which r nature given. Our skin will get loose, eyes blurry, face plumpy, teeth falling, and hair into baldness. Because our soft skin is as sensitive and delicate as a flower that withers away with time if no proper manuring is given. Our body draws the same anomalies as plants. And requires lots of worked up for a healthy, glowing skin and slim, trim figure. Therefore, it is highly important to do proper conditioning of your body to make it look newer and fresh till eternity. 

 Revealing culture to spruce up 

 ~ We all want glowing white skin, silky hair, smoky eyes, blushed cheeks, and things of all glim and glammer to look fashionable. And it has become a vogue culture today to have an astonishing figure, glam beauty, and a splitting charismatic personality. We all r perfect in our own skin but still need some beauty touch-up for a fancy look, a donning personality, and an angelic figure. Makeup industry has a huge flux of beauty and cosmetic products and a long list of potential buyers to consume it. Taking good care of our skin and health is an utmost priority for users because our health is the only wealth for a lighter, brighter skin tone. And this showy business of flexing your beauty and garnering praise will always be the 1st in polishing one's profile. The jewellery we wear, the make-up we put on, or the clothes we dress in r least for self-happiness but more for showing off and to gain compliments on our adoring looks. And to flaunt our make-up and glossy skin, we spent a big share of our money on a mere sham. 

Why beauty essentials r needed 

• By continual body and face massage, it relaxes our muscles, eases pain, rejuvenates our skin, and flushes all dead cells from the body. 

• Face clean-up and different herbal facial helps in de-tanning our skin and to lower dark pigmentation due to sun and heat waves, helps treat tiny pores by washing off layers of dust blocking these pores. 

• Using moisturizing creams and lotion makes our skin smooth, draws a thin film on our skin to reduce excess radiation and dust affecting our body.

 • Piercing in ears and other areas of our face has direct contact with the brain. It is alleged that piercing sharpens our braina, and wearing metal rings gives cooling sensation to body. 

• Wearing a bindi on our forehead also keeps our mind at peace. This is 1 of an accupressure point helps in lowering stress, cooling mental pain.

 • Regular hydra/gel facial massage helps in lightening our skin tone, making skin gleaming with shine and softness. 

• Hair spa promotes natural hair growth, treats damaged hair from the scalp, provides deep-rooted massage, giving strength to hair, improves texture and hair volume, gives ultra cleaning, and helps damaged hair follicles.

 • Using creams of high SPF, sunscreen protects our skin from the sun and suspended dust particles in the air. 

• We use concealer to hide dark spots and blemishes, contour for a sharp, pointed, chiseled structuring of nose bridge, jaw line, and forehead, foundation for giving red/ white color to skin, bronzer for a high sculpted looking face to make cheekbones, temple area more shadowy.

 • Different shades of lipstick, Nair paint, blush, and mascara to make our face look more attractive and highlighted. 

 Do we spendthrift on looks

  ~ As world is moving towards modernization and tech, we too r shaping ourselves with the modernized world. Dressing elegantly, wearing swanky outfits, and designer accessories is becoming a part of our everyday life. And we do all the necessary spending for a glam look, filtered beauty. And for everyone, personality matters a lot. Now, when our look comes 1st spending even a million bucks is no spending.
Our body is sensitive to every external substance we induce in our body, and 1 can't risk their health by using cheap, low-quality products that can harm their body. Using sub-standard products costing u less can actually cost u a lot in the long term by infecting your body in the form of rashes, itching, or some acute skin disease, putting u in an in-disposable state. So, by spending a little extra on our make-up accessories, we're putting ourselves away from the risk of endangering self and by using branded items, we're prioritising our bodily needs for comfort and ease over money. 

Conclusion

 ~ We should follow all those practices that please us, which could be a piece of jewelry, makeup, or a dress. And our happiness comes above all social or physical dimensions of home or money. And if we r lashing out our money on something which gives us some internal pleasure, we should do that all. If our happiness comes by squandering money on makeup or apparels than such spending is not more than shreds of happiness that we r getting out of it. A dashing personality comes with a cost, and that cost is the appealing beauty of makeup and designer clothes we adorn ourselves with. And every cosmetics that gives us a fair look and flawless beauty must be tried on.
